comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.STATUS IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''AccessStatus'''
COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.USER_TYPE IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''UserTypes'''

description_En: Beamline names and status of operation
description_Ar: اسماء خط الاشعاع و حالة التشغيل/ العمل
comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN BEAMLINES.REF_NATION IS 'Label=Beamline owner country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY NAME'

description_En: Proposal or user dicipline / reseacrh area
Names and codes of countries of users and institutes
description_Ar: اسماء و معرفات الدول للمستخدمين و المنشات او المعاهد

description_En: Registered institutes which users are affiliated with
description_Ar: اسماء المنشات التي ينتمي اليها المستخدمون
comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''
COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT NAME AS A FROM COUNTRIES'

description_En: User, institute and proposal id of users who participated in a proposal for beamtime/experiment
Main deatails on all proposals submitted by users for beamline experiments
description_Ar: التفاصيل المتعلقة بالمقترحات البحثية المقدمة من المستخدمين لاجراء التجارب باستخدام خطوط الاشعاع
comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'
COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI.WORK_DONE_ELE IS 'List = select code, description from list_of_values where list=''PubliWorkDoneEle'''
COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI.CONF_COUNTRY IS 'List = select code, name from countries'
COMMENT ON COLUMN PUBLI.COUNTRY_PUB IS 'List = select code, name from countries'

description_En: Lab, Beamline or Proposal tied to the publication
description_Ar: المختبر، خط الاشعاع او المقترح المرتبط بالمنشور

description_En: Shifts and hours summary for completed experiments/proposals
description_Ar: تلخيص للفترات و الساعات المستخدمة خلال اجراء التجربة / وقت الحزمة

comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN SUO_WIFI_REQ_T.DEVICE_TYPE IS 'Label=Device Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''DeviceType'''

description_En: Evaluation of the applications for the Users' meeting
Evaluation of the applications for the 17th Users' meeting
Consent/Authorize name and institution to appear in the Annual Scientific Report for Member Countries.
description_Ar: الموافقة على ادراج الاسم والمؤسسة في التقرير العلمي السنوي للدول الأعضاء.

description_En: Personal information of all registered SESAME users and proposers
description_Ar: المعلومات الشخصية لجميع المستخدمين المسجلين في سيسامي
comments: COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'

description_En: Personal / visit information of all visitors / visits to SESAME
description_Ar: المعلومات الشخصية/ تفاصيل الزيارة لجميع الزائرين الذين قدموا الى سيسامي
